features: ARGAN OIL Shampoo & Conditioner Set LARGE 300ml each
description: Product description ARGAN OIL Shampoo & Conditioner Set LARGE 250ml each Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Polyquaternium-7, Cocamide MEA Sodium Chloride, Glycol Distearate, Dimethicone, DMDM Hydantoin, Argania Spinosa Kernel (Argan) Oil, Parfum, Cetear Alcohol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Polyquaternium Disodium EDTA, Citric Acid, Benzyl Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool. INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Phenoxyethanol, Argania Spinosa Kernel (Argan)Oil, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Benzyl Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool. Directions Apply the shampoo to wet hair, massage in, rinse, then apply the conditioner to the lengths and tips, leave for a few minutes and rinse. See more
